items.title: Improve App Connectivity
items.rationale: 79% of negative reviews mention app connectivity issues, which is the most common complaint.

items.title: Enhance Setup Experience
items.rationale: 75% of negative reviews mention setup issues, indicating a significant pain point for users.

items.title: Address Customer Service Concerns
items.rationale: 31% of negative reviews mention poor customer service, which is a major source of frustration.

items.title: Investigate Battery Life Issues
items.rationale: 6% of negative reviews mention battery life concerns, which may be a hidden problem.

items.title: Optimize Accuracy Features
items.rationale: 40% of negative reviews mention accuracy issues, which can impact user trust in the product.
